data: {"generalSituation":"Upper-air disturbances will bring heavy showers and squally thunderstorms to Guangdong today. A cold front will move across the coast of southern China later today. Under the influence of the northeast monsoon associated with the cold front, temperatures will fall slightly over Guangdong in the next couple of days. Meanwhile, with the upper-air disturbances departing, showers will ease off over the region. A trough of low pressure will affect southern China during the weekend to early next week. The weather will become unsettled over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260429","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South force 4, occasionally force 5 on high ground, becoming north force 4 to 5 later.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with occasional showers and a few severe squally thunderstorms. Showers will be heavy at first.
